case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. WILLIAM ALFREDO ESTRADA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WILLIAM ALFREDO ESTRADA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTRADA, WILLIAM ALFREDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA, WILLIAM ALFREDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
